files.preview: select mov.numeromovimento as [N° Movimento],mov.numerodocumentoinicial as [N° Documento], case when mov.tipomovimento='E' then 'Entrada'else 'Saida' end as [Tipo Movimento],p1.nomepessoa as [Filial], p2.nomepessoa as [Cliente/Fornecedor],CAST(day(mov.dataemissao) as varchar(2))+'/'+CAST(month(mov.dataemissao) as varchar(2))+'/'+CAST(year(mov.dataemissao) as varchar(6)) as [Data Emissão], mov.valormovimento as [Valor
files.text:
select mov.numeromovimento as [N° Movimento],mov.numerodocumentoinicial as [N° Documento],
case when mov.tipomovimento='E' then 'Entrada'else 'Saida' end as [Tipo Movimento],p1.nomepessoa as [Filial],
p2.nomepessoa as [Cliente/Fornecedor],CAST(day(mov.dataemissao) as varchar(2))+'/'+CAST(month(mov.dataemissao) as varchar(2))+'/'+CAST(year(mov.dataemissao) as varchar(6)) as [Data Emissão],
mov.valormovimento as [Valor],tipopag.descricaotipocondicaopagamento as [Condição Pagamento],cf.CFOP as [CFOP Cabeçalho],cfpar.subcodigo as[SubCod Cabeçalho],cfpar.descricaosubcodigo as [Descrição SubCod Cab],
cfit.CFOP as [CFOP Itens Fiscais],cfsubcod.subcodigo as [Codigo SubCOdigo Contab],cfsubcod.descricaocontabilizacaosubcodigo as [Descrição Cod SubCod Contab]
from 
(SELECT [idmovimento]     
      ,[idpessoaempresa]--FILIAL     
      ,[idpessoaclientefornecedor]--CLIENTE/FORNECEDOR
      ,[tipomovimento]
      ,[numeromovimento]
      ,[numerodocumentoinicial]
      ,[dataemissao]
      ,[valormovimento]  
      ,idcondicaopagamento        
  FROM [NG_ADM].[dbo].[adm_movimento]
  where dataemissao between '20130201' and '20130228') as mov
  inner join 
  (SELECT [idmovimento] ,[idtipocondicaopagamento]      
	FROM [NG_ADM].[dbo].[adm_dadosfiscal]) as dfis 
  on dfis.idmovimento=mov.idmovimento
  inner join
	(SELECT [idmovimento]
		  ,[idcf]
		  ,[idcfparametro]
	  FROM [NG_ADM].[dbo].[adm_documentofiscal]) as docfis 
  on docfis.idmovimento=mov.idmovimento
  inner join
	(SELECT [idmovimento],[idcfop],[idcfcontabilizacaosubcodigo]
			FROM [NG_ADM].[dbo].[adm_documentofiscalitens])as docfisit 
  on docfisit.idmovimento=mov.idmovimento
  inner join
	(select idpessoa,nomepessoa from ng..bpm_pessoa) as p1 
  on p1.idpessoa=mov.idpessoaempresa
  inner join
	(select idpessoa,nomepessoa from ng..bpm_pessoa) as p2 
  on p2.idpessoa=mov.idpessoaclientefornecedor
  inner join
	(select b.idcf,str(a.codigotipooperacaocf,1)+'.'+str(b.codigocf,3)as CFOP from
			(SELECT [idtipooperacaocf]
				  ,[codigotipooperacaocf]
			FROM [NG_Dominio].[dbo].[dom_tipooperacaocf]) as a
		inner join
			(SELECT [idcf],[idtipooperacaocf],[codigocf]      
			  FROM [NG_Dominio].[dbo].[dom_cf])as b 
		on a.idtipooperacaocf=b.idtipooperacaocf)as cf 
  on cf.idcf=docfis.idcf
  inner join
  (SELECT [idcfparametro],[subcodigo],[descricaosubcodigo]      
  FROM [NG_ADM].[dbo].[adm_cfparametro])as cfpar on cfpar.idcfparametro=docfis.idcfparametro
  inner join
  (select b.idcf,str(a.codigotipooperacaocf,1)+'.'+str(b.codigocf,3)as CFOP from
			(SELECT [idtipooperacaocf]
				  ,[codigotipooperacaocf]
			FROM [NG_Dominio].[dbo].[dom_tipooperacaocf]) as a
		inner join
			(SELECT [idcf],[idtipooperacaocf],[codigocf]      
			  FROM [NG_Dominio].[dbo].[dom_cf])as b 
		on a.idtipooperacaocf=b.idtipooperacaocf)as cfit 
  on cfit.idcf=docfisit.idcfop
  left join
  (SELECT [idcfcontabilizacaosubcodigo],[descricaocontabilizacaosubcodigo],[subcodigo]      
  FROM [NG_ADM].[dbo].[adm_cfcontabilizacaosubcodigo]) as cfsubcod 
  on cfsubcod.idcfcontabilizacaosubcodigo=docfisit.idcfcontabilizacaosubcodigo
  inner join
  (SELECT [idtipocondicaopagamento],[descricaotipocondicaopagamento]     
  FROM [NG_Dominio].[dbo].[dom_tipocondicaopagamento]) as tipopag
  on tipopag.idtipocondicaopagamento=dfis.idtipocondicaopagamento

files.name: pis_cofins_mov.sql
files.preview: select mov.numeromovimento as[N° Movimento],case when mov.tipomovimento='E' then 'Entrada'else 'Saida' end as [Tipo Movimento], mov.numerodocumentoinicial as [N° Documento],CAST(day(mov.dataemissao) as varchar(2))+'/'+CAST(month(mov.dataemissao) as varchar(2))+'/'+CAST(year(mov.dataemissao) as varchar(6)) as [Data Emissão], cf.CFOP as [CFOP Cabecalho],itemcfop.CFOP as [CFOP Materiais-Serviços],itemcfop.codigoitem as
files.text:
select mov.numeromovimento as[N° Movimento],case when mov.tipomovimento='E' then 'Entrada'else 'Saida' end as [Tipo Movimento],
mov.numerodocumentoinicial as [N° Documento],CAST(day(mov.dataemissao) as varchar(2))+'/'+CAST(month(mov.dataemissao) as varchar(2))+'/'+CAST(year(mov.dataemissao) as varchar(6)) as [Data Emissão],
cf.CFOP as [CFOP Cabecalho],itemcfop.CFOP as [CFOP Materiais-Serviços],itemcfop.codigoitem as [Cod Item],itemcfop.descricaoitem as [Descrição Item]
,case when sittrib.idtributo=82 then 1 end as [pis],case when sittrib.idtributo=83 then 1 end as [cofins]
from 
(SELECT [idmovimento]     
      ,[tipomovimento]
      ,[numeromovimento]
      ,[numerodocumentoinicial]
      ,[dataemissao]
  FROM [NG_ADM].[dbo].[adm_movimento]
  where dataemissao between '20130201' and '20130228') as mov
  inner join
	(SELECT [idmovimento]
		  ,[idcf]		  
	  FROM [NG_ADM].[dbo].[adm_documentofiscal]) as docfis 
  on docfis.idmovimento=mov.idmovimento
  inner join
	(select b.idcf,str(a.codigotipooperacaocf,1)+'.'+str(b.codigocf,3)as CFOP from
			(SELECT [idtipooperacaocf]
				  ,[codigotipooperacaocf]
			FROM [NG_Dominio].[dbo].[dom_tipooperacaocf]) as a
		inner join
			(SELECT [idcf],[idtipooperacaocf],[codigocf]      
			  FROM [NG_Dominio].[dbo].[dom_cf])as b 
		on a.idtipooperacaocf=b.idtipooperacaocf
where str(a.codigotipooperacaocf,1)+'.'+str(b.codigocf,3) 
in ('1.101','2.101','1.124','1.407','1.102','2.102','2.407'))as cf 
  on cf.idcf=docfis.idcf
  inner join
	  (select a.idmovimento,b.codigoitem,b.descricaoitem,cfitem.idcf,cfitem.CFOP,a.iddocumentofiscalmercadoriaservico 
	from 
		(SELECT [idmovimento]
			  ,[iditem]
			  ,[idcfop]
			  ,[iddocumentofiscalmercadoriaservico]
		 FROM [NG_ADM].[dbo].[adm_documentofiscalmercadoriaservico]) as a
	 inner join
		(select iditem,codigoitem,descricaoitem from NG_Estoque..est_item)as b 
	 on a.iditem=b.iditem
	 inner join
		 (select b.idcf,str(a.codigotipooperacaocf,1)+'.'+str(b.codigocf,3)as CFOP from
					(SELECT [idtipooperacaocf]
						  ,[codigotipooperacaocf]
					FROM [NG_Dominio].[dbo].[dom_tipooperacaocf]) as a
				inner join
					(SELECT [idcf],[idtipooperacaocf],[codigocf]      
					  FROM [NG_Dominio].[dbo].[dom_cf])as b 
				on a.idtipooperacaocf=b.idtipooperacaocf)as cfitem
	 on cfitem.idcf=a.idcfop) as itemcfop
 on itemcfop.idmovimento=mov.idmovimento 
 inner join
	 (SELECT [iddocumentofiscalmercadoriaservico]
		  ,[idsituacaotributariaportributo]    
	  FROM [NG_ADM].[dbo].[adm_impostosmercadoriaservico]) as impmer
 on impmer.iddocumentofiscalmercadoriaservico=itemcfop.iddocumentofiscalmercadoriaservico 
 inner join
	 (SELECT [idsituacaotributariaportributo]
		  ,[idtributo]      
	  FROM [NG_Dominio].[dbo].[dom_situacaotributariaportributo]
	  )as sittrib
on sittrib.idsituacaotributariaportributo=impmer.idsituacaotributariaportributo

files.preview: select result.[N° Movimento],result.[Tipo Movimento],result.[N° Documento],result.[Data Emissão],result.[CFOP Materiais-Serviços],result.[Cod Item],result.[Descrição Item] from (select final.[N° Movimento],final.[Tipo Movimento],final.[N° Documento],final.[Data Emissão],final.[CFOP Materiais-Serviços],final.[Cod Item],final.[Descrição Item],SUM(final.pis) as [PIS],SUM(final.cofins) as [COFINS] from (select mov.numero
files.text:
select result.[N° Movimento],result.[Tipo Movimento],result.[N° Documento],result.[Data Emissão],result.[CFOP Materiais-Serviços],result.[Cod Item],result.[Descrição Item]
from
	(select final.[N° Movimento],final.[Tipo Movimento],final.[N° Documento],final.[Data Emissão],final.[CFOP Materiais-Serviços],final.[Cod Item],final.[Descrição Item],SUM(final.pis) as [PIS],SUM(final.cofins) as [COFINS] 
	from 
		(select mov.numeromovimento as[N° Movimento],case when mov.tipomovimento='E' then 'Entrada'else 'Saida' end as [Tipo Movimento],
		mov.numerodocumentoinicial as [N° Documento],CAST(day(mov.dataemissao) as varchar(2))+'/'+CAST(month(mov.dataemissao) as varchar(2))+'/'+CAST(year(mov.dataemissao) as varchar(6)) as [Data Emissão],
		cf.CFOP as [CFOP Cabecalho],itemcfop.CFOP as [CFOP Materiais-Serviços],itemcfop.codigoitem as [Cod Item],itemcfop.descricaoitem as [Descrição Item]
		,case when sittrib.idtributo=82 then 1 end as [pis],case when sittrib.idtributo=83 then 1 end as [cofins]
		from 
		(SELECT [idmovimento]     
			  ,[tipomovimento]
			  ,[numeromovimento]
			  ,[numerodocumentoinicial]
			  ,[dataemissao]
		  FROM [NG_ADM].[dbo].[adm_movimento]
		  where dataemissao between '20130201' and '20130228') as mov
		  inner join
			(SELECT [idmovimento]
				  ,[idcf]		  
			  FROM [NG_ADM].[dbo].[adm_documentofiscal]) as docfis 
		  on docfis.idmovimento=mov.idmovimento
		  inner join
			(select b.idcf,str(a.codigotipooperacaocf,1)+'.'+str(b.codigocf,3)as CFOP from
					(SELECT [idtipooperacaocf]
						  ,[codigotipooperacaocf]
					FROM [NG_Dominio].[dbo].[dom_tipooperacaocf]) as a
				inner join
					(SELECT [idcf],[idtipooperacaocf],[codigocf]      
					  FROM [NG_Dominio].[dbo].[dom_cf])as b 
				on a.idtipooperacaocf=b.idtipooperacaocf
		where str(a.codigotipooperacaocf,1)+'.'+str(b.codigocf,3) 
		in ('1.101','2.101','1.124','1.407','1.102','2.102','2.407'))as cf 
		  on cf.idcf=docfis.idcf
		  inner join
			  (select a.idmovimento,b.codigoitem,b.descricaoitem,cfitem.idcf,cfitem.CFOP,a.iddocumentofiscalmercadoriaservico 
			from 
				(SELECT [idmovimento]
					  ,[iditem]
					  ,[idcfop]
					  ,[iddocumentofiscalmercadoriaservico]
				 FROM [NG_ADM].[dbo].[adm_documentofiscalmercadoriaservico]) as a
			 inner join
				(select iditem,codigoitem,descricaoitem from NG_Estoque..est_item)as b 
			 on a.iditem=b.iditem
			 inner join
				 (select b.idcf,str(a.codigotipooperacaocf,1)+'.'+str(b.codigocf,3)as CFOP from
							(SELECT [idtipooperacaocf]
								  ,[codigotipooperacaocf]
							FROM [NG_Dominio].[dbo].[dom_tipooperacaocf]) as a
						inner join
							(SELECT [idcf],[idtipooperacaocf],[codigocf]      
							  FROM [NG_Dominio].[dbo].[dom_cf])as b 
						on a.idtipooperacaocf=b.idtipooperacaocf)as cfitem
			 on cfitem.idcf=a.idcfop) as itemcfop
		 on itemcfop.idmovimento=mov.idmovimento 
		 inner join
			 (SELECT [iddocumentofiscalmercadoriaservico]
				  ,[idsituacaotributariaportributo]    
			  FROM [NG_ADM].[dbo].[adm_impostosmercadoriaservico]) as impmer
		 on impmer.iddocumentofiscalmercadoriaservico=itemcfop.iddocumentofiscalmercadoriaservico 
		 inner join
			 (SELECT [idsituacaotributariaportributo]
				  ,[idtributo]      
			  FROM [NG_Dominio].[dbo].[dom_situacaotributariaportributo]
			  )as sittrib
		on sittrib.idsituacaotributariaportributo=impmer.idsituacaotributariaportributo)as final
	group by final.[N° Movimento],final.[Tipo Movimento],final.[N° Documento],final.[Data Emissão],final.[CFOP Materiais-Serviços],final.[Cod Item],final.[Descrição Item]) as result
	 
 where result.PIS is null or result.COFINS is null
 order by result.[N° Documento]

IF SUBSTRING(nota-fisc-adc.cod-livre-2,1,60) = "" THEN ASSIGN OVERLAY(nota-fisc-adc.cod-livre-2,1,60) = nota-fiscal.cod-chave-aces-nf-eletro FOR EACH docum-est WHERE nro-docto = "0007764" AND cod-emitente = 10280: FOR EACH nota-fisc-adc WHERE nota-fisc-adc.cdn-emitente = docum-est.cod
files.text:
for each item-doc-est WHERE  nro-docto = "0007764"
AND cod-emitente=10280:
    DISP item-doc-est.cod-emitente WITH 1 COLUMN WIDTH 320.
END.

IF SUBSTRING(nota-fisc-adc.cod-livre-2,1,60) = "" THEN
                        ASSIGN OVERLAY(nota-fisc-adc.cod-livre-2,1,60) = nota-fiscal.cod-chave-aces-nf-eletro
						
						
						FOR EACH docum-est WHERE    nro-docto = "0007764" AND cod-emitente = 10280:
    FOR EACH nota-fisc-adc WHERE nota-fisc-adc.cdn-emitente = docum-est.cod-emitente
        AND cod-nota-fisc = docum-est.nro-docto
        :
    DISP cod-docto-referado cod-nota-fisc SUBSTRING(nota-fisc-adc.cod-livre-2,1,60).
        END.
END.



**************
FOR EACH docum-est WHERE    nro-docto    EQ "0007764" 
                        AND cod-emitente EQ 10280
                        AND serie-docto  EQ "1"   :
    FOR EACH nota-fisc-adc WHERE nota-fisc-adc.cdn-emitente = docum-est.cod-emitente
        AND cod-nota-fisc = docum-est.nro-docto
        :
        DISP cod-docto-referado cod-ser-docto-referado cod-serie cod-nota-fisc SUBSTRING(nota-fisc-adc.cod-livre-2,1,60).
        FIND nota-fiscal WHERE nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis EQ nota-fisc-adc.cod-docto-referado
                            AND nota-fiscal.serie      EQ nota-fisc-adc.cod-ser-docto-referado NO-ERROR.

        IF AVAIL nota-fiscal THEN DO:
            DISP nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis.
        END.
    END.
END.
**********************************************************


OUTPUT TO VALUE('C:\TEMP\7764.TXT').

FOR EACH docum-est WHERE    nro-docto    EQ "0007764" 
                        AND cod-emitente EQ 10280
                        AND serie-docto  EQ "1"   :
    FOR EACH nota-fisc-adc WHERE nota-fisc-adc.cdn-emitente = docum-est.cod-emitente
        AND cod-nota-fisc = docum-est.nro-docto
        :
        
        FIND ret-nf-eletro WHERE ret-nf-eletro.nr-nota-fis  EQ nota-fisc-adc.cod-docto-referado
                                AND ret-nf-eletro.cod-serie EQ nota-fisc-adc.cod-ser-docto-referado NO-ERROR.

        IF AVAIL ret-nf-eletro THEN DO:
            
            put unformatted "cod-estabel                 :"ret-nf-eletro.cod-estabel       skip.
            put unformatted "cod-serie                   :"ret-nf-eletro.cod-serie         skip.
            put unformatted "nr-nota-fis                 :"ret-nf-eletro.nr-nota-fis       skip.
            put unformatted "idi-orig-solicit            :"ret-nf-eletro.idi-orig-solicit  skip.
            put unformatted "cod-msg                     :"ret-nf-eletro.cod-msg           skip.
            put unformatted "dat-ret                     :"ret-nf-eletro.dat-ret           skip.
            put unformatted "hra-ret                     :"ret-nf-eletro.hra-ret           skip.
            put unformatted "log-ativo                   :"ret-nf-eletro.log-ativo         skip.
            put unformatted "cod-livre-1                 :"ret-nf-eletro.cod-livre-1       skip.
            put unformatted "cod-livre-2                 :"ret-nf-eletro.cod-livre-2       skip.
            put unformatted "log-livre-1                 :"ret-nf-eletro.log-livre-1       skip.
            put unformatted "log-livre-2                 :"ret-nf-eletro.log-livre-2       skip.
            put unformatted "num-livre-1                 :"ret-nf-eletro.num-livre-1       skip.
            put unformatted "num-livre-2                 :"ret-nf-eletro.num-livre-2       skip.
            put unformatted "val-livre-1                 :"ret-nf-eletro.val-livre-1       skip.
            put unformatted "val-livre-2                 :"ret-nf-eletro.val-livre-2       skip.
            put unformatted "dat-livre-1                 :"ret-nf-eletro.dat-livre-1       skip.
            put unformatted "dat-livre-2                 :"ret-nf-eletro.dat-livre-2       skip.
        
        END.
            
        
    END.
END.
OUTPUT CLOSE.


***************************


OUTPUT TO VALUE('C:\TEMP\7764.TXT').

FOR EACH docum-est WHERE    nro-docto    EQ "0007764" 
                        AND cod-emitente EQ 10280
                        AND serie-docto  EQ "1"   :
    FOR EACH nota-fisc-adc WHERE nota-fisc-adc.cdn-emitente = docum-est.cod-emitente
        AND cod-nota-fisc = docum-est.nro-docto
        :
        
       FIND nota-fiscal WHERE nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis EQ nota-fisc-adc.cod-docto-referado
                            AND nota-fiscal.serie      EQ nota-fisc-adc.cod-ser-docto-referado NO-ERROR.

        IF AVAIL nota-fiscal THEN DO:
            IF SUBSTRING(nota-fisc-adc.cod-livre-2,1,60) = "" THEN DO:
               ASSIGN OVERLAY(nota-fisc-adc.cod-livre-2,1,60) = substring(nota-fiscal.char-2,2,45).
            END.
                        
        END.
                        
        
        
            
        
    END.
END.
OUTPUT CLOSE.


*********************************************************************
FOR EACH docum-est WHERE    dt-atualiza >= 01/01/2017
                            AND dt-atualiza <= 01/31/2017   :
    FOR EACH nota-fisc-adc WHERE nota-fisc-adc.cdn-emitente = docum-est.cod-emitente
        AND cod-nota-fisc = docum-est.nro-docto
        :
        
       FIND nota-fiscal WHERE nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis EQ nota-fisc-adc.cod-docto-referado
                            AND nota-fiscal.serie      EQ nota-fisc-adc.cod-ser-docto-referado NO-ERROR.

        IF AVAIL nota-fiscal THEN DO:
            IF SUBSTRING(nota-fisc-adc.cod-livre-2,1,60) = "" THEN DO:
               ASSIGN OVERLAY(nota-fisc-adc.cod-livre-2,1,60) = substring(nota-fiscal.char-2,2,45).
            END.
                        
        END.
                        
        
        
            
        
    END.
END.



**************************************************************************
FOR EACH docum-est WHERE    dt-atualiza >= 01/27/2017
                            AND dt-atualiza <= 01/31/2017   
                            AND cod-estabel = "402":
    FOR EACH nota-fisc-adc WHERE nota-fisc-adc.cdn-emitente = docum-est.cod-emitente
        AND cod-nota-fisc = docum-est.nro-docto
        :
       IF SUBSTRING(nota-fisc-adc.cod-livre-2,1,60) = "" THEN DO: 
            FIND nota-fiscal WHERE nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis EQ nota-fisc-adc.cod-docto-referado
                            AND nota-fiscal.serie      EQ nota-fisc-adc.cod-ser-docto-referado NO-ERROR.

            IF AVAIL nota-fiscal THEN DO:
               ASSIGN OVERLAY(nota-fisc-adc.cod-livre-2,1,60) = substring(nota-fiscal.char-2,2,45).
            END.
                        
        END.
        
    END.
END.

****************************************************************************
FOR EACH nota-fiscal WHERE    dt-emis-nota >= 01/01/2017
                            AND dt-emis-nota <= 01/31/2017   
                            AND cod-estabel = "403"
                            :
   
    FOR EACH nota-fisc-adc WHERE nota-fisc-adc.cdn-emitente = nota-fiscal.cod-emitente
        AND cod-nota-fisc = nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis
        :
       IF SUBSTRING(nota-fisc-adc.cod-livre-2,1,60) = "" THEN DO:
           FIND docum-est WHERE docum-est.nro-docto    EQ nota-fisc-adc.cod-docto-referado
                            AND docum-est.serie        EQ nota-fisc-adc.cod-ser-docto-referado
                            AND docum-est.cod-emitente EQ nota-fisc-adc.cdn-emitente NO-ERROR.

            IF AVAIL docum-est THEN DO:
               ASSIGN OVERLAY(nota-fisc-adc.cod-livre-2,1,60) = SUBSTRING(docum-est.char-1,93,44).
/*                 MESSAGE SUBSTRING(docum-est.char-1,93,44) VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX. */
            END.

        END.

    END.
END.

files.name: Query_fornecedor.txt
files.preview: USE [NG] GO select b.nomepessoa,c.logradouro,c.numeroendereco,c.bairro,c.cep,d.nomemunicipio,e.nomeuf,f.nomepais, g.descricaotipocontato,J.descricaotipocontato ,H.descricaotipocontato,i.cnpj,i.inscricaoestadual,i.inscricaomunicipal from (SELECT [iddadosfornecedor] ,[idpessoa] FROM [dbo].[bpm_dadosfornecedor] where idowner=19218 and indativo = 1) as a inner join (select * from ng..bpm_pessoa) as b on a.idpessoa=b.idpe
files.text:
USE [NG]
GO

select b.nomepessoa,c.logradouro,c.numeroendereco,c.bairro,c.cep,d.nomemunicipio,e.nomeuf,f.nomepais,
g.descricaotipocontato,J.descricaotipocontato ,H.descricaotipocontato,i.cnpj,i.inscricaoestadual,i.inscricaomunicipal
from
(SELECT [iddadosfornecedor] ,[idpessoa] FROM [dbo].[bpm_dadosfornecedor]
  where idowner=19218 and indativo = 1) as a
  inner join
(select * from ng..bpm_pessoa) as b on a.idpessoa=b.idpessoa
left join
(select * from ng..bpm_pessoaendereco where indprincipal=1) as c on a.idpessoa=c.idpessoa
left join
(select * from NG_DOMINIO..dom_municipio) as d on c.idmunicipio=d.idmunicipio
left join
(select * from NG_DOMINIO..dom_uf) as e on d.iduf=e.iduf
left join
(select * from NG_DOMINIO..dom_pais) as f on e.idpais=f.idpais
left join
(select * from ng..bpm_pessoatipocontato where idtipocontato=2 and indcontatoprincipal=1) as g on a.idpessoa=g.idpessoa
left join
(select * from ng..bpm_pessoatipocontato where idtipocontato=3 ) as h on a.idpessoa=h.idpessoa
left join 
(select * from ng..bpm_dadospessoajuridica) as i on a.idpessoa=i.idpessoa
left join
(select * from ng..bpm_pessoatipocontato where idtipocontato=4 ) as J on a.idpessoa=J.idpessoa



GO

files.preview: USE [NG_ESTOQUE] GO select a.descricaoitem,b.siglaunidademedida,j.descricaosituacaomercadoria [Grupo Mercadoria],a.codigoitem,d.descricaofamilia,e.pesobruto,e.pesoliquido ,h.descricaocategoriamercadoria as [Grupo Materiais],'F' as [Tipo Preço],a.precovenda,i.descricaotipomercadoria,f.ncm,g.descricaoorigemmercadoria from (SELECT [iditem] ,[est_iditem] ,[idtipoitem] ,[iddepartamento] ,[idfamilia] ,[idclasse] ,[idgrupo]
files.text:
USE [NG_ESTOQUE]
GO

select a.descricaoitem,b.siglaunidademedida,j.descricaosituacaomercadoria [Grupo Mercadoria],a.codigoitem,d.descricaofamilia,e.pesobruto,e.pesoliquido
,h.descricaocategoriamercadoria as [Grupo Materiais],'F' as [Tipo Preço],a.precovenda,i.descricaotipomercadoria,f.ncm,g.descricaoorigemmercadoria
 from 
(SELECT [iditem]
      ,[est_iditem]
      ,[idtipoitem]
      ,[iddepartamento]
      ,[idfamilia]
      ,[idclasse]
      ,[idgrupo]
      ,[idsubgrupo]
      ,[idcategoria]
      ,[idunidademedida]
      ,[idindexadoreconomicofinanceiro]
      ,[idcontagerencialcompra]
      ,[idcontagerencialvenda]
      ,[idcontagerencialusoconsumo]
      ,[idtipometaunica]
      ,[codigoitem]
      ,[descricaoitem]
      ,[descricaocompleta]
      ,[precovenda]
      ,[percentualcomissao]
      ,[percentualmargemlucro]
      ,[percentualdescontomaximo]
      ,[indregistroimportado]
      ,[codigomercadoriaexterno]
      ,[datacadastroitem]
      ,[indutilizadescricaocomplementar]
      ,[datadesativacao]
      ,[motivodesativacao]
      ,[valormetaunica]
      ,[indativo]
      ,[idowner]
      ,[idusuariolog]
      ,[datahoralog]
      ,[idorigemregistro]
      ,[idembalagem]
  FROM [dbo].[est_item]
  where idowner =19218 and indativo=1) as a
  left join
  (select * from NG_ESTOQUE..est_unidademedida) as b on a.idunidademedida=b.idunidademedida
  left join
  (select * from NG_ESTOQUE..est_grupo) as c on a.idgrupo=c.idgrupo
  left join
  (select * from NG_ESTOQUE..est_familia) as d on a.idfamilia=d.idfamilia
  left join
  (select * from NG_ESTOQUE..est_itemmaterial) as e on a.iditem=e.iditem
  left join
  (select * from NG_ESTOQUE..est_itemdadosfiscais) as f on a.iditem=f.iditem
  left join
  (select * from NG_DOMINIO..dom_origemmercadoria) as g on f.idorigemmercadoria=g.idorigemmercadoria
  left join
  (select * from NG_DOMINIO..dom_categoriamercadoria) as h on f.idcategoriamercadoria=h.idcategoriamercadoria
  left join
  (select * from NG_DOMINIO..dom_tipomercadoria) as i on f.idtipomercadoria=i.idtipomercadoria
  left join
  (select * from NG_DOMINIO..dom_situacaomercadoria) as j on f.idsituacaomercadoria=j.idsituacaomercadoria
  
GO

files.name: ASNFornecedor.txt
files.preview: /* Programacao de entregas dos fornecedores */ /* RND001 - Versão 057 */ DEF VAR c-linha AS CHARACTER FORMAT "x(128)" NO-UNDO . DEF VAR c-nome-plan AS CHARACTER FORMAT "x(256)" NO-UNDO . DEF VAR c-nome-anexos AS CHARACTER FORMAT "x(256)" NO-UNDO . DEF VAR wi AS INTEGER INIT 0 NO-UNDO . DEF VAR wj AS INTEGER INIT 0 NO-UNDO . DEF VAR de-acum AS DEC INIT 0 NO-UNDO . DEF VAR nota-atual AS CHAR NO-UNDO . /*---------------
files.text:
/* Programacao de entregas dos fornecedores */
/* RND001 - Versão 057 */


DEF VAR c-linha             AS CHARACTER FORMAT "x(128)"  NO-UNDO .
DEF VAR c-nome-plan         AS CHARACTER FORMAT "x(256)"  NO-UNDO .
DEF VAR c-nome-anexos       AS CHARACTER FORMAT "x(256)"  NO-UNDO .
DEF VAR wi                  AS INTEGER INIT 0             NO-UNDO .
DEF VAR wj                  AS INTEGER INIT 0             NO-UNDO .
DEF VAR de-acum             AS DEC     INIT 0             NO-UNDO .
DEF VAR nota-atual          AS CHAR                       NO-UNDO .

/*--------------- Definicao para usar o Excel ------------------*/
DEFINE VARIABLE h-acomp       AS   HANDLE                 NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VAR chexcelapplication AS COM-HANDLE .
DEFINE VAR chworkbook         AS COM-HANDLE .
DEFINE VAR chworksheet        AS COM-HANDLE .


/* ITP */
DEF VAR d-dt-geracao-arq      AS DATE FORMAT "99/99/9999" NO-UNDO .
DEF VAR c-hr-geracao-arq      AS CHAR                     NO-UNDO .
DEF VAR c-cnpj-transmissor    AS CHAR                     NO-UNDO .
DEF VAR c-cnpj-receptor       AS CHAR                     NO-UNDO .
DEF VAR c-cod-transmissor     AS CHAR                     NO-UNDO .

/* AE1*/
DEF VAR au-num-nfe           AS CHAR                      NO-UNDO.
DEF VAR au-serie             AS CHAR                      NO-UNDO.
DEF VAR au-data-nfe          AS DATE FORMAT "99/99/9999"  NO-UNDO.
DEF VAR au-val-nfe           AS DEC  FORMAT ">>>,>>>,>>9" NO-UNDO.
DEF VAR au-nat-oper          AS CHAR                      NO-UNDO.
DEF VAR au-data-prev         AS DATE FORMAT "99/99/9999"  NO-UNDO.

/*AE2 */
DEF VAR ad-num-ped          AS CHAR                       NO-UNDO.
DEF VAR ad-cod-item         AS CHAR                       NO-UNDO.
DEF VAR ad-qde-it-nfe       AS DEC  FORMAT ">>>,>>>,>>9"  NO-UNDO.
DEF VAR ad-unid-med         AS CHAR                       NO-UNDO.
DEF VAR ad-ncm              AS INT                        NO-UNDO.
DEF VAR ad-val-unit-item    AS DEC  FORMAT ">>>,>>>,>>9"  NO-UNDO.

/*AE4 */
DEF VAR aq-preco-tot-merc   AS DEC  FORMAT ">>>,>>>,>>9"  NO-UNDO .


DEF TEMP-TABLE tt-file 
    FIELD nome-arq-full AS CHAR FORMAT "x(40)" 
    INDEX ch-file  nome-arq-full .

DEF TEMP-TABLE tt-entr-forn
     FIELD d-dt-geracao-arq      AS DATE FORMAT "99/99/9999" 
     FIELD c-hr-geracao-arq      AS CHAR                     
     FIELD c-cnpj-transmissor    AS CHAR                     
     FIELD c-cnpj-receptor       AS CHAR                     
     FIELD c-cod-transmissor     AS CHAR                     
     FIELD au-num-nfe            AS CHAR                      
     FIELD au-serie              AS CHAR                      
     FIELD au-data-nfe           AS DATE FORMAT "99/99/9999"  
     FIELD au-val-nfe            AS DEC  FORMAT ">>>,>>>,>>9" 
     FIELD au-nat-oper           AS CHAR                      
     FIELD au-data-prev          AS DATE FORMAT "99/99/9999"  
     FIELD ad-num-ped            AS CHAR                       
     FIELD ad-cod-item           AS CHAR                       
     FIELD ad-qde-it-nfe         AS DEC  FORMAT ">>>,>>>,>>9"  
     FIELD ad-unid-med           AS CHAR                       
     FIELD ad-ncm                AS INT                        
     FIELD ad-val-unit-item      AS DEC  FORMAT ">>>,>>>,>>9"  
     FIELD aq-preco-tot-merc     AS DEC  FORMAT ">>>,>>>,>>9".  

DEF TEMP-TABLE tt-release
    FIELD dt-geracao-arq      AS DATE FORMAT "99/99/9999"
    FIELD hr-geracao-arq      AS CHAR FORMAT "xx:xx:xx" 
    FIELD cnpj-transmissor    AS CHAR
    FIELD cnpj-receptor       AS CHAR
    FIELD cod-transmissor     AS CHAR 
    FIELD nr-release          AS CHAR
    FIELD dt-release          AS DATE FORMAT "99/99/9999" 
    FIELD qtd-nec-acumulada   AS DEC  FORMAT ">>>,>>>,>>9"
    FIELD it-codigo           AS CHAR FORMAT "x(18)"
    FIELD it-codigo-ford      AS CHAR FORMAT "x(18)" 
    FIELD nr-pedcli           AS CHAR
    FIELD cod-planta          AS CHAR
    FIELD cod-doca            AS CHAR
    FIELD nr-ult-nota-fisc    AS CHAR
    FIELD serie-ult-nota-fisc AS CHAR
    FIELD dt-ult-nota-fisc    AS DATE FORMAT "99/99/9999" 
    FIELD qtd-entrega-acumulada AS DEC FORMAT ">>>,>>>,>>9"
    FIELD cod-tipo-fornec     AS CHAR    /* P = Producao   E = Exportacao */
    FIELD dt-entrega          AS DATE FORMAT "99/99/9999" 
    FIELD hr-entrega          AS CHAR FORMAT "XX:XX:XX" 
    FIELD qtd-entrega         AS DEC  FORMAT ">>>,>>>,>>9"
    INDEX ch-pri /* IS UNIQUE PRIMARY */ dt-geracao-arq cnpj-transmissor cnpj-receptor cod-transmissor it-codigo cod-planta cod-doca dt-entrega hr-entrega .




INPUT FROM OS-DIR("\\192.168.120.45\Sintel\IN\Grupo\ASN\teste") NO-ATTR-LIST .

REPEAT ON ERROR UNDO, LEAVE :

    IMPORT DELIMITER '"' c-linha c-linha .

    /* Apenas considerar os arquivos com extensão .lib */
    IF NOT ( c-linha MATCHES ("*.lib" ) )  THEN NEXT .

    IF SEARCH( c-linha ) EQ ?  THEN  NEXT .


    CREATE tt-file .
    ASSIGN tt-file.nome-arq-full = c-linha .


END.
INPUT CLOSE .



FOR EACH tt-file :

    RUN pi_importa_registros .

    OS-COPY VALUE( tt-file.nome-arq-full ) \\192.168.120.45\Sintel\IN\Grupo\ASN\processados .
    OS-DELETE VALUE( tt-file.nome-arq-full ) NO-ERROR .  
    

END.

DEF TEMP-TABLE tt-entr-forn-item LIKE tt-entr-forn.
FOR EACH tt-entr-forn :
    CREATE  tt-entr-forn-item.
    BUFFER-COPY  tt-entr-forn TO  tt-entr-forn-item.
END.

ASSIGN nota-atual = "".
FOR EACH tt-entr-forn :
    IF tt-entr-forn.au-num-nfe EQ nota-atual  THEN NEXT. 
        MESSAGE tt-entr-forn.c-cnpj-transmissor
         tt-entr-forn.c-cnpj-receptor 
         tt-entr-forn.au-num-nfe      
         tt-entr-forn.au-serie      
         tt-entr-forn.au-data-nfe   
         tt-entr-forn.au-val-nfe    
         tt-entr-forn.au-nat-oper   
         tt-entr-forn.au-data-prev  VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.

        FIND estabelec WHERE estabelec.cgc  EQ  tt-entr-forn.c-cnpj-receptor NO-ERROR.
            IF AVAIL estabelec THEN MESSAGE estabelec.cgc estabelec.cod-estabel estabelec.nome VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.

        FIND emitente WHERE emitente.cgc EQ tt-entr-forn.c-cnpj-transmissor NO-ERROR.
            IF AVAIL emitente THEN MESSAGE emitente.cod-emitente nome-abrev VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.
            FIND FIRST cont-emit WHERE cont-emit.cod-emitente EQ emitente.cod-emitente NO-ERROR.
                IF AVAIL cont-emit THEN MESSAGE cont-emit.nome cont-emit.telefone cont-emit.e-mail VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.

        FOR EACH tt-entr-forn-item WHERE tt-entr-forn-item.au-num-nfe EQ tt-entr-forn.au-num-nfe :
            MESSAGE tt-entr-forn-item.ad-num-ped        
                    tt-entr-forn-item.ad-cod-item       
                    tt-entr-forn-item.ad-qde-it-nfe     
                    tt-entr-forn-item.ad-unid-med       
                    tt-entr-forn-item.ad-ncm            
                    tt-entr-forn-item.ad-val-unit-item  
                    tt-entr-forn-item.aq-preco-tot-merc VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.

            FIND item-fornec WHERE item-fornec.item-do-forn EQ tt-entr-forn-item.ad-cod-item
                               AND item-fornec.cod-emitente EQ emitente.cod-emitente NO-ERROR.
                IF AVAIL item-fornec THEN DO:
                    FIND ITEM WHERE ITEM.it-codigo EQ item-fornec.it-codigo NO-ERROR.
                        IF AVAIL ITEM THEN MESSAGE ITEM.it-codigo ITEM.desc-item VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.
                END.
                ELSE DO:
                    MESSAGE "ITEM SEM CADASTRO NO CC0105" VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.
                END.

        END.


        ASSIGN nota-atual = tt-entr-forn.au-num-nfe.

END.




/*                                                                                                                                                                                        */
/* FOR EACH tt-release BREAK BY tt-release.nr-release                                                                                                                                     */
/*                           BY tt-release.cod-planta                                                                                                                                     */
/*                           BY tt-release.cod-doca                                                                                                                                       */
/*                           BY tt-release.cod-tipo-fornec                                                                                                                                */
/*                           BY tt-release.it-codigo                                                                                                                                      */

files.text:
DEF VAR qt-etiq AS INT.    
    
   FOR EACH doc-fiscal NO-LOCK
        WHERE nr-doc-fis = "0002523"
        AND serie = "1"
        AND cod-emitente = 13175 :
        FOR EACH it-doc-fisc OF doc-fiscal NO-LOCK :
            FOR EACH item-doc-est  NO-LOCK WHERE item-doc-est.it-codigo  EQ it-doc-fisc.it-codigo
                                             AND item-doc-est.nro-docto  EQ it-doc-fisc.nr-doc-fis :
    
                FIND ITEM WHERE ITEM.it-codigo EQ it-doc-fisc.it-codigo NO-ERROR.
                FIND item-caixa WHERE item-caixa.it-codigo EQ it-doc-fisc.it-codigo NO-ERROR.
                FIND embalag WHERE embalag.sigla-emb EQ item-caixa.sigla-emb NO-ERROR.
                FIND emitente WHERE emitente.cod-emitente EQ it-doc-fisc.cod-emitente NO-ERROR.

                IF it-doc-fisc.quantidade MOD item-caixa.qt-item = 0  THEN DO:
                    qt-etiq = it-doc-fisc.quantidade / item-caixa.qt-item .
                END.
                ELSE DO:
                     qt-etiq = (it-doc-fisc.quantidade / item-caixa.qt-item) + 1 .
                END.
    
                DISP  it-doc-fisc.nr-doc-fis it-doc-fisc.serie it-doc-fisc.cod-emitente doc-fiscal.dt-docto
                it-doc-fisc.it-codigo it-doc-fisc.quantidade item-doc-est.lote item-doc-est.un ITEM.desc-item 
                item-caixa.sigla-emb item-caixa.qt-item embalag.descricao emitente.nome-emit qt-etiq WITH 1 COLUMN WIDTH 320 .
            END.
        
        END.
        
    END.

DEF VAR qt-etiq AS INT.
DEF VAR qt-un-etiq AS INT.

ASSIGN qt-un-etiq =0.
    
   FOR EACH doc-fiscal NO-LOCK
        WHERE nr-doc-fis = "0002523"
        AND serie = "1"
        AND cod-emitente = 13175 :
        FOR EACH it-doc-fisc OF doc-fiscal NO-LOCK :
            FOR EACH item-doc-est  NO-LOCK WHERE item-doc-est.it-codigo  EQ it-doc-fisc.it-codigo
                                             AND item-doc-est.nro-docto  EQ it-doc-fisc.nr-doc-fis :
    
                FIND ITEM WHERE ITEM.it-codigo EQ it-doc-fisc.it-codigo NO-ERROR.
                FIND item-caixa WHERE item-caixa.it-codigo EQ it-doc-fisc.it-codigo NO-ERROR.
                FIND embalag WHERE embalag.sigla-emb EQ item-caixa.sigla-emb NO-ERROR.
                FIND emitente WHERE emitente.cod-emitente EQ it-doc-fisc.cod-emitente NO-ERROR.

                IF it-doc-fisc.quantidade MOD item-caixa.qt-item = 0  THEN DO:
                    qt-etiq = it-doc-fisc.quantidade / item-caixa.qt-item .
                END.
                ELSE DO:
                     qt-etiq = (it-doc-fisc.quantidade / item-caixa.qt-item) + 1 .
                END.

                DO WHILE (qt-un-etiq + item-caixa.qt-item ) < it-doc-fisc.quantidade :
                    qt-un-etiq = qt-un-etiq + item-caixa.qt-item.
                   put unformatted   it-doc-fisc.nr-doc-fis ";" it-doc-fisc.serie ";" it-doc-fisc.cod-emitente ";" doc-fiscal.dt-docto ";"
                    it-doc-fisc.it-codigo ";" it-doc-fisc.quantidade ";" item-doc-est.lote ";" item-doc-est.un ";" ITEM.desc-item ";"
                    item-caixa.sigla-emb ";" item-caixa.qt-item ";" embalag.descricao ";" emitente.nome-emit ";" qt-etiq ";"  item-caixa.qt-item skip.
                END.

                put unformatted   it-doc-fisc.nr-doc-fis ";" it-doc-fisc.serie ";" it-doc-fisc.cod-emitente ";" doc-fiscal.dt-docto ";"
                    it-doc-fisc.it-codigo ";" it-doc-fisc.quantidade ";" item-doc-est.lote ";" item-doc-est.un ";" ITEM.desc-item ";"
                    item-caixa.sigla-emb ";" item-caixa.qt-item ";" embalag.descricao ";" emitente.nome-emit ";" qt-etiq ";" (it-doc-fisc.quantidade - qt-un-etiq) skip.

                OUTPUT CLOSE.
            END.
        
        END.
        
    END.

/*******************************************************************************
 * Programa : ES0097F.P
 * Descricao: IMPRESSÃO DE ETIQUETAS DE MATERIA PRIMA
 * Autor    : CLAYSON OLIVEIRA
 * Data     :FEVEREIRO/2014
 * Versao   : 1.00.000 - Versao Inicial 
 ******************************************************************************/
/*-------------- Parametros  -----------------------------------------------*/

/* DEFINE INPUT PARAMETER c-cod-emitente LIKE doc-fiscal.cod-emitent NO-UNDO . */
/* DEFINE INPUT PARAMETER c-serie        LIKE doc-fiscal.serie       NO-UNDO . */
/* DEFINE INPUT PARAMETER c-nr-nota      LIKE doc-fiscal.nr-doc-fis  NO-UNDO . */

DEFINE VARIABLE chexcelapplication AS COM-HANDLE NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE chworkbook         AS COM-HANDLE NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE chworksheet        AS COM-HANDLE NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-linha            AS CHAR NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-nome-plan        AS CHARACTER FORMAT "x(256)"  NO-UNDO .

OUTPUT TO VALUE('C:\TEMP\ETIQ.csv').
DEF VAR qt-etiq AS INT.
DEF VAR qt-un-etiq AS INT.

ASSIGN qt-un-etiq =0.
    
   FOR EACH doc-fiscal NO-LOCK
        WHERE nr-doc-fis = "0002523"
        AND serie = "1"
        AND cod-emitente = 13175 :
        FOR EACH it-doc-fisc OF doc-fiscal NO-LOCK :
            FOR EACH item-doc-est  NO-LOCK WHERE item-doc-est.it-codigo  EQ it-doc-fisc.it-codigo
                                             AND item-doc-est.nro-docto  EQ it-doc-fisc.nr-doc-fis :
    
                FIND ITEM WHERE ITEM.it-codigo             EQ it-doc-fisc.it-codigo NO-ERROR.
                FIND item-caixa WHERE item-caixa.it-codigo EQ it-doc-fisc.it-codigo NO-ERROR.
                IF NOT AVAIL item-caixa THEN do:
                    MESSAGE "Item: " it-doc-fisc.it-codigo " Sem cadastro de embalagem! " VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.
                    RETURN ERROR.
                END.

                FIND embalag  WHERE embalag.sigla-emb     EQ item-caixa.sigla-emb NO-ERROR.
                FIND emitente WHERE emitente.cod-emitente EQ it-doc-fisc.cod-emitente NO-ERROR.

                IF it-doc-fisc.quantidade MOD item-caixa.qt-item = 0  THEN DO:
                    qt-etiq = it-doc-fisc.quantidade / item-caixa.qt-item .
                END.
                ELSE DO:
                     qt-etiq = (it-doc-fisc.quantidade / item-caixa.qt-item) + 1 .
                END.
                

                CREATE  "excel.application" chexcelapplication.
                ASSIGN c-linha = PROPATH .
                IF c-linha MATCHES ("*des206b*")  THEN chworkbook  = chexcelapplication:workbooks:OPEN("T:\esp206b\Doc\ETIQ_MP.xlsx") .
                ELSE chworkbook  = chexcelapplication:workbooks:OPEN("T:\esp206b\Doc\ETIQ_MP.xlsx") .
                chworksheet = chexcelapplication:Sheets("Plan1") .                      
    
                ASSIGN c-nome-plan = SESSION:TEMP-DIRECTORY + "ETIQ_MP.xlsx"  .
                
                chworksheet:range("Q5"):VALUE  = TRIM( item-doc-est.lote ).
                chworksheet:range("o11"):VALUE  =  doc-fiscal.dt-docto.
                chworksheet:range("c8"):VALUE  = TRIM( ITEM.desc-item ).
                chworksheet:range("b11"):VALUE  = TRIM( it-doc-fisc.it-codigo ).
                chworksheet:range("ac18"):VALUE  = TRIM( it-doc-fisc.it-codigo ).
                chworksheet:range("b14"):VALUE  = TRIM( it-doc-fisc.serie ).
                chworksheet:range("e14"):VALUE  = TRIM(it-doc-fisc.nr-doc-fis ).
                chworksheet:range("h17"):VALUE  = TRIM(item-doc-est.un ).
                chworksheet:range("b20"):VALUE  = TRIM(item-caixa.sigla-emb ).
                chworksheet:range("h20"):VALUE  = TRIM(embalag.descricao ).
                chworksheet:range("b23"):VALUE  = it-doc-fisc.cod-emitente.
                chworksheet:range("h23"):VALUE  = TRIM(emitente.nome-abrev ).
                

                DO WHILE (qt-un-etiq + item-caixa.qt-item ) < it-doc-fisc.quantidade :
                    qt-un-etiq = qt-un-etiq + item-caixa.qt-item.
                   put unformatted   it-doc-fisc.nr-doc-fis ";" it-doc-fisc.serie ";" it-doc-fisc.cod-emitente ";" doc-fiscal.dt-docto ";"
                    it-doc-fisc.it-codigo ";" it-doc-fisc.quantidade ";" item-doc-est.lote ";" item-doc-est.un ";" ITEM.desc-item ";"
                    item-caixa.sigla-emb ";" item-caixa.qt-item ";" embalag.descricao ";" emitente.nome-emit ";" qt-etiq ";"  item-caixa.qt-item skip.
                   chworksheet:range("b17"):VALUE  =  item-caixa.qt-item . 
                   chworksheet:PrintOut(YES). 
                END.

                put unformatted   it-doc-fisc.nr-doc-fis ";" it-doc-fisc.serie ";" it-doc-fisc.cod-emitente ";" doc-fiscal.dt-docto ";"
                    it-doc-fisc.it-codigo ";" it-doc-fisc.quantidade ";" item-doc-est.lote ";" item-doc-est.un ";" ITEM.desc-item ";"
                    item-caixa.sigla-emb ";" item-caixa.qt-item ";" embalag.descricao ";" emitente.nome-emit ";" qt-etiq ";" 
                    IF (it-doc-fisc.quantidade - qt-un-etiq) > 0 THEN (it-doc-fisc.quantidade - qt-un-etiq) ELSE it-doc-fisc.quantidade skip.
                    IF (it-doc-fisc.quantidade - qt-un-etiq) > 0 THEN DO:
                        chworksheet:range("b17"):VALUE  =  (it-doc-fisc.quantidade - qt-un-etiq).
                    END.
                    ELSE DO:
                        chworksheet:range("b17"):VALUE  =  it-doc-fisc.quantidade.
                    END.
                    

                chworksheet:PrintOut(YES).          
                OS-DELETE VALUE ( c-nome-plan ) NO-ERROR .  
                chworksheet:SaveAs(c-nome-plan).
                chworkbook:CLOSE(YES).
                RELEASE OBJECT chexcelapplication   .
                RELEASE OBJECT chworkbook           .
                RELEASE OBJECT chworksheet          .
                END.
        
        END.
        
    END.
    OUTPUT CLOSE.

files.text:
OUTPUT TO VALUE ('c:\temp\asnforn3.csv').
PUT UNFORMATTED "Nota" ";" "Serie" ";" "Data Nfe" ";" "CNPJ" ";" "Cod Emitente" ";" "Nome Abrev" ";" "Item" ";" "Num Pedido" SKIP.
FOR EACH es-entr-forn NO-LOCK
    WHERE  au-data-nfe >= 04/01/2015:
    FIND emitente WHERE emitente.cgc  EQ es-entr-forn.c-cnpj-transmissor NO-ERROR.

    PUT UNFORMATTED es-entr-forn.au-num-nfe ";"
                    es-entr-forn.au-serie   ";"
                    es-entr-forn.au-data-nfe ";"
                 "'"es-entr-forn.c-cnpj-transmissor ";"
                    emitente.cod-emitente ";"
                    emitente.nome-abrev ";"
                    es-entr-forn.ad-cod-item ";"
                     es-entr-forn.ad-num-ped SKIP.
END.
OUTPUT CLOSE.

files.preview: DEFINE TEMP-TABLE tt-itens LIKE es-entr-forn . DEF VAR c-arquivo AS CHAR FORMAT "x(50)". UPDATE c-arquivo. MESSAGE "SEARCH(c-arquivo): " SEARCH(c-arquivo) VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX. INPUT FROM VALUE(SEARCH(c-arquivo)). REPEAT : CREATE tt-itens. IMPORT DELIMITER ";" tt-itens. END. INPUT CLOSE. MESSAGE "CAN-FIND(FIRST tt-itens): " CAN-FIND(FIRST tt-itens) VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX. FOR EACH tt-itens: CREATE es-entr-forn. BUFFER-COPY t
files.text:
DEFINE TEMP-TABLE tt-itens LIKE es-entr-forn .

DEF VAR c-arquivo AS CHAR FORMAT "x(50)".
UPDATE c-arquivo.

MESSAGE "SEARCH(c-arquivo): " SEARCH(c-arquivo) VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.

 INPUT FROM VALUE(SEARCH(c-arquivo)).
REPEAT :
     CREATE tt-itens.
     IMPORT DELIMITER ";" tt-itens.
END.
INPUT CLOSE.

MESSAGE "CAN-FIND(FIRST tt-itens): " CAN-FIND(FIRST tt-itens) VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.

FOR EACH tt-itens:
    CREATE  es-entr-forn.
    BUFFER-COPY  tt-itens TO es-entr-forn.
END.

files.text:
FOR EACH item-uni-estab NO-LOCK
    WHERE cod-comprado = "aoliveira":
    DISP it-codigo cod-estabel.
END.

Alteração de comprador do item

FOR EACH item EXCLUSIVE-LOCK
    WHERE cod-comprado = "aoliveira"
    AND it-codigo ="2030240":
    UPDATE it-codigo cod-estabel cod-comprado.
END.


FOR EACH fam-uni-estab :
    ASSIGN cod-comprado = "alexandre.s"
END.

*************compradores de EDI

FOR EACH item-uni-estab where cod-estabel EQ "402"
						 and ( it-codigo   EQ "315000030"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "GN15A31148APIA06"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "GN15A31148APIA15"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "GN15A31148APIA16"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "GN15A31148APIA17"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "GN15A31149APIA15"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "GN15A31149APIA16"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "GN15A31149APIA17"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "CN1525262AA"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "2N15N16C266AA"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "2S65A16C266BA"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "2S65A24344AA"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "2S6517008AA35B8"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "85GGA01691AA"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "CN1517005AC"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "KN1517005AB"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "CN15N16E560BA"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "CN15N16E561BA"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "CN15N01492AA"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "2S65B13014AB"
						 or   it-codigo   EQ "2S65B13014BA"):						 
    assign cod-comprado = "patricia.s".
    
END.

files.name: es0097a.p
files.text:
/*******************************************************************************
 * Programa : ES0097A.P
 * Descricao: IMPRESSÇO DE ETIQUETAS VDA4902 Version 4 para a FORD
 * Autor    : MµRCIO
 * Data     : Mar‡o/2013
 * Versao   : 2.01.000 - Versao Inicial 
 ******************************************************************************/
/*-------------- Parametros  -----------------------------------------------*/

DEFINE INPUT PARAMETER c-cod-estabel LIKE nota-fiscal.cod-estabel NO-UNDO .
DEFINE INPUT PARAMETER c-serie       LIKE nota-fiscal.serie       NO-UNDO .
DEFINE INPUT PARAMETER c-nr-nota-ini LIKE nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis NO-UNDO .
DEFINE INPUT PARAMETER c-nr-nota-fim LIKE nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis NO-UNDO .

/*
DEFINE VAR c-cod-estabel LIKE nota-fiscal.cod-estabel NO-UNDO INIT "403" .
DEFINE VAR c-serie       LIKE nota-fiscal.serie       NO-UNDO INIT "143" .
DEFINE VAR c-nr-nota-ini LIKE nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis NO-UNDO INIT "0100031" .
DEFINE VAR c-nr-nota-fim LIKE nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis NO-UNDO INIT "0100031" .
*/

DEFINE VARIABLE chexcelapplication AS COM-HANDLE NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE chworkbook         AS COM-HANDLE NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE chworksheet        AS COM-HANDLE NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-linha            AS CHAR NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-nome-plan        AS CHARACTER FORMAT "x(256)"  NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE de-peso-bruto      AS DEC  NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE de-peso-liquido    AS DEC  NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE i-nr-embalagens    AS DEC  NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-it-codigo        AS CHAR NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-unload-point     AS CHAR NO-UNDO .

/*
DEFINE BUFFER bitem-embal FOR item-embal .
*/

FOR EACH nota-fiscal NO-LOCK 
                     WHERE nota-fiscal.cod-estabel EQ c-cod-estabel
                     AND   nota-fiscal.serie       EQ c-serie
                     AND   nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis GE c-nr-nota-ini
                     AND   nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis LE c-nr-nota-fim
                     :

    FOR EACH nota-embal OF nota-fiscal NO-LOCK :


        ASSIGN i-nr-embalagens = 0 .
        FOR EACH item-embal OF nota-embal  NO-LOCK :
            ASSIGN i-nr-embalagens = i-nr-embalagens + 1 .
        END.

        FOR EACH item-embal OF nota-embal NO-LOCK 
                                          BREAK BY item-embal.it-codigo 
                                                BY item-embal.sigla-emb :

            /*
            IF FIRST-OF(item-embal.it-codigo) THEN DO:
                ASSIGN i-nr-embalagens = 0 .
                FOR EACH bitem-embal OF nota-embal 
                                        WHERE bitem-embal.it-codigo EQ item-embal.it-codigo NO-LOCK :
                    ASSIGN i-nr-embalagens = i-nr-embalagens + 1 .
                END.
            END.
            */

            CREATE  "excel.application" chexcelapplication.
            ASSIGN c-linha = PROPATH .
            IF c-linha MATCHES ("*des206b*")  THEN chworkbook  = chexcelapplication:workbooks:OPEN("T:\esp206b\doc\VDA4902V04.xlsx") .
            ELSE chworkbook  = chexcelapplication:workbooks:OPEN("T:\esp206b\doc\VDA4902V04.xlsx") .
            chworksheet = chexcelapplication:Sheets("VDA_Ford") .                      

            ASSIGN c-nome-plan = SESSION:TEMP-DIRECTORY + "Etiq_VDA.xlsx"  .

            FIND it-nota-fisc OF item-embal NO-LOCK NO-ERROR .
            FIND ped-venda OF it-nota-fisc NO-LOCK NO-ERROR .
            ASSIGN c-unload-point = "" .
            IF AVAIL ped-venda THEN DO:
                FIND es-ped-venda OF ped-venda NO-LOCK NO-ERROR .
                IF AVAIL es-ped-venda  THEN DO:
                    ASSIGN 
                        c-unload-point = STRING ( INT(es-ped-venda.cod-planta), "99" ) + " - " + STRING( INT ( es-ped-venda.cod-doca), "99" )  .
                END.
            END.


            FIND embalag OF item-embal NO-LOCK NO-ERROR .
            FIND ITEM WHERE ITEM.it-codigo EQ item-embal.it-codigo NO-LOCK NO-ERROR .

            ASSIGN c-it-codigo = ITEM.it-codigo .
            FIND item-cli WHERE item-cli.it-codigo  EQ item-embal.it-codigo
                          AND   item-cli.nome-abrev EQ nota-fiscal.nome-ab-cli
                          NO-LOCK NO-ERROR .
            IF AVAIL item-cli THEN ASSIGN c-it-codigo = item-cli.item-do-cli .
            ELSE ASSIGN c-it-codigo =  ITEM.it-codigo .

            IF ITEM.desc-nacional NE "" THEN ASSIGN c-it-codigo = ITEM.desc-nacional  .

            ASSIGN de-peso-liquido = ITEM.peso-bruto * item-embal.dec-1 .
            ASSIGN de-peso-bruto   = ( ITEM.peso-bruto * item-embal.dec-1 ) + embalag.peso-embal .


            chworksheet:range("O4"):VALUE  = TRIM( c-unload-point ).

            chworksheet:range("D9"):VALUE  = TRIM( nota-fiscal.serie + nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis ).
            chworksheet:range("C11"):VALUE = "*" + TRIM( nota-fiscal.serie + nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis ) + "*" .

            chworksheet:range("O13"):VALUE = de-peso-liquido .
            chworksheet:range("S13"):VALUE = de-peso-bruto   .
            chworksheet:range("W13"):VALUE = i-nr-embalagens .

            chworksheet:range("C16"):VALUE  = TRIM( c-it-codigo ).
            chworksheet:range("M16"):VALUE = "*" + REPLACE( TRIM( c-it-codigo ) , " " , "" )  + "*" .

            chworksheet:range("C21"):VALUE  = item-embal.dec-1 .
            chworksheet:range("H21"):VALUE = "*" + TRIM( STRING(item-embal.dec-1 ) ) + "*" .

            chworksheet:range("O21"):VALUE  = TRIM(ITEM.desc-inter ) .

            chworksheet:range("O25"):VALUE  = TRIM(embalag.descricao ) .

            chworksheet:range("C26"):VALUE  = "LQR0"   .
            chworksheet:range("H26"):VALUE  = "*LQR0*" .

            chworksheet:range("O29"):VALUE  = STRING(nota-fiscal.dt-emis, "99/99/9999" ) .

            chworksheet:range("U29"):VALUE  = TRIM(ITEM.inform-compl) .

            chworksheet:range("C31"):VALUE  = item-embal.int-1 .
            chworksheet:range("H31"):VALUE  = "*" + TRIM( STRING ( item-embal.int-1 ) ) + "*" . 

            chworksheet:range("O33"):VALUE  = "*" + TRIM( STRING ( item-embal.serie + item-embal.nr-nota-fis + STRING(item-embal.nr-seq-fat, "999") +  STRING(item-embal.int-1, "999") ) )  + "*" . 


            chworksheet:PrintOut(YES).          
            OS-DELETE VALUE ( c-nome-plan ) NO-ERROR .  
            chworksheet:SaveAs(c-nome-plan).
            chworkbook:CLOSE(YES).
            RELEASE OBJECT chexcelapplication   .
            RELEASE OBJECT chworkbook           .
            RELEASE OBJECT chworksheet          .


        END.

    END.




END.

/*******************************************************************************
 * Empresa  : DATASUL METROPOLITANA S/A
 * cliente  : Pelzer
 * Programa : ES0097RP.P
 * Descricao: Aviso de Embarque 
 * Autor    : M rcio A. Pereira
 * Data     : Julho de 2004
 * Versao   : 2.00.000 - M rcio A. Pereira
 *            Versao Inicial.
              2.00.001 - M rcio A. Pereira  (05/08/2004)
              Altera‡Æo para permitir a gera‡Æo de v rios avisos de embarques 
              para clientes diferentes  (DSH) e (DSC) .
              2.00.002 - M rcio A. Pereira  (22/10/2004) 
              Alterada a sequencia da leitura dos registros do item da nota-fiscal 
              de it-codigo para nr-seq-fat
              2.00.003 - M rcio A. Pereira  (22/10/2004)
              Desenvolvida uma mascara para impressao dos Itens da VW  
              2.00.004 - M rcio A. Pereira  (29/10/2004)
              Implementada a rotina de enviar e-mail com arquivo anexado para a Mercedes Benz 
              2.00.005 - M rcio A. Pereira  (17/11/2004)
              Desenvolvido um novo Lay-Out para gera‡Æo de arquivos do tipo EDIFACT 
              2.00.006 - M rcio A. Pereira  (13/12/2004)
              Desenvolvido o Lay-Out para a GM  P&A e GM Mat. Prima 
              2.00.007 - M rcio A. Pereira  (16/12/2004)
              Desenvolvido o Lay-out para a Lear (RND)
              2.00.008 - M rcio A. Pereira  (27/12/2004)
              Desenvolvido o Lay-out para a Ford (RND)
              2.00.009 - M rcio A. Pereira  (17/03/2005)
              Manuten‡Æo no programa para atualizar a tabela es-deljit
              e tamb‚m para nÆo criar arquivo texto sem conteudo .
              2.00.010 - M rcio A. Pereira (09/05/2005)
              InclusÆo do Lay-Out da PSA 
              2.00.011 - M rcio A. Pereira / Vagner Clemente (14/09/2005)
              Corre‡Æo de erro Progress (Wait for statement) 
              2.00.012 - M rcio A. Pereira (30/08/2005)
              Envio de Notas Fiscais Complementares (Tipo 4) para a DAIMLER - Embalagens
              2.00.013 - M rcio A. Pereira (12/02/2007)
              Arrendondamento do campo Peso Bruto do arquivo de EDIFACT da GM 
              2.00.014 - M rcio A. Pereira (13/04/2007)
              Implementa‡Æo da fun‡Æo de Reenvio
              2.00.015 - M rcio A. Pereira ( 17/04/2007 )
              Mascarar os c¢digo para a Daimler 
              2.00.016 - M rcio A. Pereira ( 22/04/2007 )
              Altera‡Æo para verificar os Numeros de Pedidos da Ford (Exporta‡Æo ) 
              2.00.017 - M rcio A. Pereira ( 04/09/2007 )
              InclusÆo da OpcÆo para gerar arquivos no diret¢rio da Sintel 
              2.00.018 - M rcio A. Pereira ( 25/10/2007)
              Altera‡Æo dos Lay-outs padräes ITP004 para padrÆo Sintel
              2.00.019 - M rcio A. Pereira ( 18/04/2008)
              InclusÆo dos Registros NF2 e NF4 para Clientes de DSH
              2.00.020 - M rcio A. Pereira ( 12/09/2008)
              Cria‡Æo de Log na tabela es-nota-fiscal 
              2.00.021 - M rcio A. Pereira ( 28/04/2009 )
              Altera‡Æo da sequencia dos itens do AEG para igualar com a NF eletronica
              2.00.022 - M rcio A. Pereira ( 06/05/2009)
              Foi interrompido a gera‡Æo de avisos de embarque ITP004 para a VW .
              2.00.023 - M rcio A. Pereira ( 27/05/2009 )
              Alterado a versÆo do AEG, para AEGv05 apenas para clientes do DSH
              2.00.024 - M rcio A. Pereira (11/04/2010)
              Alterado para criar um novo segmento para a NFE, atendendo solicitacoes da FAURECIA
              \\192.168.120.45\sintel\out\grupo\
              2.00.025 - M rcio A. Pereira (11/10/2011)
              Alterado para apenas considerar os codigos de planta dos pedidos em "PROCEDURE pi-gera-AEGv02"
              
 *
 ******************************************************************************/

/* Codigos de Parceiros EDI           Envia
   200.002 = Ford        - RND                 
   200.004 = GM          - EDIFACT     X
   200.005 = VW          - RND
   200.006 = GM (P&A)    - EDIFACT     X
   200.007 = Lear        - RND         X
   200.008 = Daimler SBC - RND
   200.009 = Daimler MG  - RND
   200.010 = PSA         - EDIFACT 
   200.011 = Faurecia    - AEGv02
*/


/*------------- Definicao de Buffer -----------------------------------------*/
DEFINE BUFFER b-it-nota-fisc       FOR it-nota-fisc .
DEFINE BUFFER b-emitente           FOR emitente .    
DEFINE BUFFER b-emitente-estabelec FOR emitente .    
DEFINE BUFFER b-es-etiq-psa        FOR es-etiq-psa .

/*------------- Definicao de Temp-Table --------------------------------------*/
DEFINE TEMP-TABLE tt-param
    FIELD destino          AS INTEGER 
    FIELD arquivo          AS CHAR 
    FIELD usuario          AS CHAR FORMAT "x(12)"
    FIELD data-exec        AS DATE 
    FIELD hora-exec        AS INTEGER 
    FIELD cod-estabel    LIKE nota-fiscal.cod-estabel
    FIELD serie          LIKE nota-fiscal.serie
    FIELD cliente-ini    LIKE nota-fiscal.cod-emitente
    FIELD nr-nota-ini    LIKE nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis
    FIELD nr-nota-fim    LIKE nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis
    FIELD dt-emis-ini    AS   DATE FORMAT  "99/99/9999"
    FIELD dt-emis-fim    AS   DATE FORMAT  "99/99/9999" 
    FIELD reenvia        AS   LOGICAL INIT NO 
    FIELD conc           AS   LOGICAL INIT NO 
    FIELD grupo          AS   CHAR INIT "" 
    FIELD edi            AS   INTEGER .

DEFINE TEMP-TABLE tt-log-conf
    FIELD cod-estabel     LIKE nota-fiscal.cod-estabel
    FIELD serie           LIKE nota-fiscal.serie
    FIELD nr-nota-fis     LIKE nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis
    FIELD nr-seq-fat      LIKE it-nota-fisc.nr-seq-fat
    FIELD it-codigo       LIKE it-nota-fisc.it-codigo
    FIELD dt-emissao      LIKE nota-fiscal.dt-emis-nota
    FIELD nr-pedcli       LIKE nota-fiscal.nr-pedcli
    FIELD nome-abrev      LIKE nota-fiscal.nome-ab-cli
    FIELD nat-operacao    LIKE nota-fiscal.nat-operacao
    FIELD vl-preuni       LIKE it-nota-fisc.vl-preuni
    FIELD valor-icms      LIKE nota-fiscal.vl-tot-ipi
    FIELD valor-ipi       LIKE nota-fiscal.vl-tot-ipi
    FIELD Valor-tot       LIKE nota-fiscal.vl-tot-nota
    INDEX nota cod-estabel
               serie
               nr-nota-fis
               nr-seq-fat
               it-codigo
               .

DEFINE TEMP-TABLE t-nf-edi
    FIELD cod-estabel      LIKE nota-fiscal.cod-estabel
    FIELD serie            LIKE nota-fiscal.serie
    FIELD nr-nota-fis      LIKE nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis
    FIELD cod-parceiro-edi LIKE emitente.cod-parceiro-edi
    INDEX idx-nota IS PRIMARY UNIQUE cod-estabel serie nr-nota-fis 
    INDEX idx-parceiro cod-parceiro-edi cod-estabel serie nr-nota-fis .



DEFINE TEMP-TABLE tt-raw-digita FIELD raw-digita AS RAW .

/*-------------- Definicao Parametros -----------------------------------*/
DEFINE INPUT PARAMETER raw-param AS RAW NO-UNDO .
DEFINE INPUT PARAMETER TABLE FOR tt-raw-digita .

/*--------------- Definicao de Variaveis --------------------------------*/
DEFINE VARIABLE h-acomp          AS   HANDLE    NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-cgc            AS   CHARACTER NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE rc-cgc           AS   CHARACTER NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE i-tam            AS   INTEGER   NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE i-reg-trans      AS   INTEGER   NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE i-tot-item-nf    AS   INTEGER   NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-dt-emissao     AS   CHARACTER NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-dt-saida       AS   CHARACTER NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-dt-prvenc      AS   CHARACTER NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE de-tot-icms      LIKE it-nota-fisc.vl-icms-it  NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE de-tot-icms-sub  LIKE it-nota-fisc.vl-icms-it NO-UNDO .                
DEFINE VARIABLE c-sit-trib       AS   CHARACTER NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-ped-lin-vw-ford     AS   CHARACTER NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-ger-movto      AS   CHARACTER NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE v_log_gerou_mov  AS   LOGICAL   NO-UNDO INIT  FALSE  .
DEFINE VARIABLE l-first          AS   LOGICAL   NO-UNDO INIT  YES .
DEFINE VARIABLE i-cod-gr-cli     LIKE emitente.cod-gr-cli NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-planta         AS   CHARACTER FORMAT "x(3)"  NO-UNDO  .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-doca           LIKE es-deljit.cod-doca       NO-UNDO  .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-serie          LIKE nota-fiscal.serie        NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-arq-saida      AS   CHARACTER FORMAT "x(20)" NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-diretorio      AS   CHARACTER FORMAT "x(40)" NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-arq-saida-full AS   CHARACTER FORMAT "x(20)" NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-arq-bkp        AS   CHARACTER FORMAT "x(20)" NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE c-peso-brut      AS   CHARACTER                NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE de-peso-real     AS   DECIMAL FORMAT ">>>>>>>>9.999"  NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE de-peso-cubado   AS   DECIMAL FORMAT ">>>>>>>>9.999"  NO-UNDO .
DEFINE VARIABLE de-vl-pis        AS   DEC INITIAL 0 NO-UNDO .

files.text:
DEF TEMP-TABLE tt-itens
    FIELD au-num-nfe              LIKE es-entr-forn.au-num-nfe
    FIELD au-serie                LIKE es-entr-forn.au-serie
    FIELD au-data-nfe             LIKE es-entr-forn.au-data-nfe
    FIELD c-cnpj-transmissor      LIKE es-entr-forn.c-cnpj-transmissor 
    FIELD cod-emitente            LIKE emitente.cod-emitente
    FIELD nome-abrev              LIKE emitente.nome-abrev
    FIELD ad-cod-item             LIKE es-entr-forn.ad-cod-item
    FIELD ad-num-ped              LIKE es-entr-forn.ad-num-ped.

DEF VAR c-arquivo AS CHAR FORMAT "x(50)".
UPDATE c-arquivo.

MESSAGE "SEARCH(c-arquivo): " SEARCH(c-arquivo) VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.

 INPUT FROM VALUE(SEARCH(c-arquivo)).
REPEAT :
     CREATE tt-itens.
     IMPORT DELIMITER ";" tt-itens.
END.
INPUT CLOSE.

MESSAGE "CAN-FIND(FIRST tt-itens): " CAN-FIND(FIRST tt-itens) VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.

FOR EACH tt-itens.
/*     MESSAGE tt-itens.au-num-nfe         */
/*             tt-itens.au-serie           */
/*             tt-itens.c-cnpj-transmissor */
/*             tt-itens.ad-cod-item        */
/*         VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.              */




    FIND es-entr-forn WHERE int(es-entr-forn.au-num-nfe)            EQ  int(tt-itens.au-num-nfe)
                        AND es-entr-forn.au-serie                   EQ  string(tt-itens.au-serie)
                        AND es-entr-forn.c-cnpj-transmissor         EQ  REPLACE(tt-itens.c-cnpj-transmissor,"'","")
                        AND es-entr-forn.ad-cod-item                EQ  tt-itens.ad-cod-item NO-ERROR.

    IF AVAIL es-entr-forn THEN DO:
        ASSIGN es-entr-forn.ad-num-ped = tt-itens.ad-num-ped.
/*         MESSAGE "achou" VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX. */

    END.
   
                               
END.

OUTPUT TO v:/TEMP/Lista-TipodoItem.txt. files.text:
/************************************************************/
/**         PROGRAMA PARA LISTA O TIPO DO ITEM             **/
/************************************************************/  
DEF VAR c-desc-tipo-item AS CHAR FORMAT "x(30)".


OUTPUT TO v:/TEMP/Lista-TipodoItem.txt.

PUT "Lista Tipo do Item para Todos os Itens Ativos (Relacionamento do Item X Estabelecimento - CD0147)"  SKIP(1)
    "Estab"         AT 01
    "Item"          AT 08
    "Tipo do Item"  AT 28
    SKIP
    "-----"               AT 01  
    "----------------"    AT 08
    "------------------------------"  AT 28
    SKIP.

FOR EACH item-uni-estab NO-LOCK,
    EACH ITEM where
         item.it-codigo = item-uni-estab.it-codigo and
         item.cod-obsoleto = 1 NO-LOCK:  /* 1 - Ativo */
    
  PUT  item-uni-estab.cod-estabel FORMAT "x(3)"   AT 01
       item-uni-estab.it-codigo   FORMAT "x(16)"  AT 08.
  IF substring(item-uni-estab.char-1,133,1) = "" THEN   ASSIGN c-desc-tipo-item = "Nao informado".
  IF substring(item-uni-estab.char-1,133,1) = "a" THEN  ASSIGN c-desc-tipo-item = "10- Outros Insumos".
  IF substring(item-uni-estab.char-1,133,1) = "b" THEN  ASSIGN c-desc-tipo-item = "99- Outras".
  IF substring(item-uni-estab.char-1,133,1) = "0" THEN  ASSIGN c-desc-tipo-item = "0 - Mercadoria para Revenda".
  IF substring(item-uni-estab.char-1,133,1) = "1" THEN  ASSIGN c-desc-tipo-item = "1 - Materia Prima".
  IF substring(item-uni-estab.char-1,133,1) = "2" THEN  ASSIGN c-desc-tipo-item = "2 - Embalagem".
  IF substring(item-uni-estab.char-1,133,1) = "3" THEN  ASSIGN c-desc-tipo-item = "3 - Produto em Processo".
  IF substring(item-uni-estab.char-1,133,1) = "4" THEN  ASSIGN c-desc-tipo-item = "4 - Produto Acabado".
  IF substring(item-uni-estab.char-1,133,1) = "5" THEN  ASSIGN c-desc-tipo-item = "5 - SubProduto".
  IF substring(item-uni-estab.char-1,133,1) = "6" THEN  ASSIGN c-desc-tipo-item = "6 - Produto Intermediario".
  IF substring(item-uni-estab.char-1,133,1) = "7" THEN  ASSIGN c-desc-tipo-item = "7 - Material de Uso e Consumo".
  IF substring(item-uni-estab.char-1,133,1) = "8" THEN  ASSIGN c-desc-tipo-item = "8 - Ativo Imobilizado".
  IF substring(item-uni-estab.char-1,133,1) = "9" THEN  ASSIGN c-desc-tipo-item = "9 - Servicos".

  put c-desc-tipo-item FORMAT "x(30)"  AT 28
      SKIP.
 END.

UPDATE c-arquivo SKIP c-estabel. INPUT FROM VALUE(SEARCH(c-arquivo)). REPEAT : CREATE tt-itens. IMPORT DELIMITER ";" tt-itens. END. INPUT CLOSE. FOR EACH tt-itens. FIND ITEM WHERE ITEM.it-codigo = tt-itens.tt-it-codigo NO-ERROR. IF NOT AVAIL ITEM T
files.text:
DEF TEMP-TABLE tt-itens
    FIELD tt-it-codigo   LIKE ITEM.it-codigo
    FIELD tt-tipo        AS INT.
DEF VAR c-arquivo AS CHAR FORMAT "x(50)".
DEF VAR c-estabel LIKE estabelec.cod-estabe.
UPDATE c-arquivo SKIP
       c-estabel.
INPUT FROM VALUE(SEARCH(c-arquivo)).
REPEAT :
     CREATE tt-itens.
     IMPORT DELIMITER ";" tt-itens.
END.
INPUT CLOSE.
FOR EACH tt-itens.
    FIND ITEM  WHERE
         ITEM.it-codigo = tt-itens.tt-it-codigo NO-ERROR.
    IF NOT AVAIL ITEM THEN NEXT.
    FIND ITEM-uni-estab WHERE
         item-uni-estab.cod-estabel = c-estabel AND
         item-uni-estab.it-codigo = ITEM.it-codigo NO-ERROR.
    IF AVAIL item-uni-estab THEN
       ASSIGN substring(item-uni-estab.char-1,133,1) = string(tt-itens.tt-tipo).
    ASSIGN substring(ITEM.char-2,212,1) = string(tt-itens.tt-tipo).
END.

UPDATE c-arquivo. MESSAGE "SEARCH(c-arquivo): " SEARCH(c-arquivo) VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX. INPUT FROM VALUE(SEARCH(c-arquivo)). REPEAT : CREATE tt-itens. IMPORT DELIMITER ";" tt-itens. END. INPUT CLOSE. MESSAGE "CAN-FIND(FIRST tt-itens): " CAN-FIND(FIRST
files.text:
DEF TEMP-TABLE tt-itens
    FIELD cod-estabel    LIKE estabelec.cod-estabel
    FIELD tt-it-codigo   LIKE ITEM.it-codigo
    FIELD tt-tipo        AS INT.

DEF VAR c-arquivo AS CHAR FORMAT "x(50)".
UPDATE c-arquivo.

MESSAGE "SEARCH(c-arquivo): " SEARCH(c-arquivo) VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.

 INPUT FROM VALUE(SEARCH(c-arquivo)).
REPEAT :
     CREATE tt-itens.
     IMPORT DELIMITER ";" tt-itens.
END.
INPUT CLOSE.

MESSAGE "CAN-FIND(FIRST tt-itens): " CAN-FIND(FIRST tt-itens) VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.

FOR EACH tt-itens.
    FIND ITEM  WHERE
         ITEM.it-codigo = tt-itens.tt-it-codigo NO-ERROR.
    IF NOT AVAIL ITEM THEN NEXT.
    FIND ITEM-uni-estab WHERE
         item-uni-estab.cod-estabel = tt-itens.cod-estabel AND
         item-uni-estab.it-codigo   = ITEM.it-codigo NO-ERROR.
    IF AVAIL item-uni-estab THEN
       ASSIGN substring(item-uni-estab.char-1,133,1) = string(tt-itens.tt-tipo).
    ASSIGN substring(ITEM.char-2,212,1) = string(tt-itens.tt-tipo).
END.

ASSIGN es-ext-ped-item.nome-abrev = ped-item.nome-abrev es-ext-ped-item.nr-sequencia = ped-item.nr-sequencia es-ext-ped-item.it-codigo = ped-item.it-codigo es-ext-ped-item.nr-pedcli = "219" es-ext-ped-item.num-pedido-cliente = "1". END. DEFINE TEMP-TABLE temp-es-ex LIKE es-ext-ped-item. FOR EAC
files.text:
FOR EACH ped-item WHERE nr-pedcli = "219":
/*     DISP  nome-abrev  nr-sequencia  it-codigo nr-pedcli 1. */
    CREATE es-ext-ped-item.
        ASSIGN   es-ext-ped-item.nome-abrev          = ped-item.nome-abrev 
                 es-ext-ped-item.nr-sequencia        = ped-item.nr-sequencia
                 es-ext-ped-item.it-codigo           = ped-item.it-codigo
                 es-ext-ped-item.nr-pedcli           = "219"
                 es-ext-ped-item.num-pedido-cliente  = "1".
END.




DEFINE TEMP-TABLE temp-es-ex LIKE es-ext-ped-item.


FOR EACH es-ext-ped-item WHERE es-ext-ped-item.nr-pedcli = "115" NO-LOCK:
   CREATE temp-es-ex.
   BUFFER-COPY es-ext-ped-item TO temp-es-ex.
END.

FOR EACH es-ext-ped-item WHERE   es-ext-ped-item.nr-pedcli = "219":
   FIND temp-es-ex WHERE temp-es-ex.it-codigo     EQ es-ext-ped-item.it-codigo
                     AND temp-es-ex.nr-sequencia  EQ es-ext-ped-item.nr-sequencia.

   IF AVAIL temp-es-ex THEN DO:
       ASSIGN es-ext-ped-item.num-pedido-cliente = temp-es-ex.num-pedido-cliente.
   END.
   ELSE DO:
       MESSAGE es-ext-ped-item.it-codigo es-ext-ped-item.nr-sequencia VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.
   END.
END.

files.text:
for each es-ext-ped-item exclusive-lock
where nr-pedcli="4":
display es-ext-ped-item with 1 column width 320.


update a
set a.num-pedido-cliente=b.num-pedido-cliente
from es-ext-ped-item as a 
	inner join es-ext-ped-item as b 
	on b.nr-pedcli=4 
	and a.it-codigo=b.it-codigo 
	and a.nr-pedcli=109
	
	
	select a.nr-pedcli,a.num-pedido-cliente,b.nr-pedcli,b  .num-pedido-cliente 
from es-ext-ped-item  a 
	inner join es-ext-ped-item  b 
	on b.nr-pedcli="4" 
	and a.it-codigo=b.it-codigo 
	and a.nr-pedcli="109" 
	
	""Update com inner join progress""
	DEFINE BUFFER b-es-ext-ped-item       FOR es-ext-ped-item .
FOR EACH es-ext-ped-item OF ped-venda NO-LOCK :
    for each b-es-ext-ped-item where b-es-ext-ped-item.it-codigo EQ es-ext-ped-item.it-codigo
                                     AND b-es-ext-ped-item.nr-pedcli EQ "4"
                                     AND es-ext-ped-item.nr-pedcli EQ "112":
        assign es-ext-ped-item.num-pedido-cliente = b-es-ext-ped-item.num-pedido-cliente.
    end.

end. 

for each es-ext-ped-item exclusive-lock

    where nr-pedcli="109":
    assign nr-pedcli="112".

files.text:
OUTPUT TO VALUE('C:\TEMP\ItenNAlterados.TXT').
DEF TEMP-TABLE  tt-doc-fisc
    FIELD cod-estabel  LIKE it-doc-fisc.cod-estabel
    FIELD serie        LIKE it-doc-fisc.serie
    FIELD nr-doc-fis   LIKE it-doc-fisc.nr-doc-fis
    FIELD cod-emitente Like it-doc-fisc.cod-emitente
    FIELD nat-operacao LIKE it-doc-fisc.nat-operacao
    FIELD nr-seq-doc   LIKE it-doc-fisc.nr-seq-doc
    FIELD it-codigo    LIKE it-doc-fisc.it-codigo
    FIELD val-pis      LIKE it-doc-fisc.val-pis 
    FIELD aliq-pis     LIKE it-doc-fisc.aliq-pis
    FIELD val-cofins   LIKE it-doc-fisc.val-cofins
    FIELD aliq-cofins  LIKE it-doc-fisc.aliq-cofins.
    

    
DEF VAR c-arquivo AS CHAR FORMAT "x(50)".
UPDATE c-arquivo.

MESSAGE "SEARCH(c-arquivo): " SEARCH(c-arquivo) VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.

 INPUT FROM VALUE(SEARCH(c-arquivo)).
REPEAT :
     CREATE tt-doc-fisc.
     IMPORT DELIMITER ";" tt-doc-fisc.
END.
INPUT CLOSE.

MESSAGE "CAN-FIND(FIRST tt-doc-fisc): " CAN-FIND(FIRST tt-doc-fisc) VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.

FOR EACH tt-doc-fisc.
    FIND it-doc-fisc WHERE
        it-doc-fisc.cod-estabel = tt-doc-fisc.cod-estabel
        and it-doc-fisc.serie = tt-doc-fisc.serie
        and it-doc-fisc.nr-doc-fis = tt-doc-fisc.nr-doc-fis
        and it-doc-fisc.cod-emitente = tt-doc-fisc.cod-emitente
        and it-doc-fisc.nat-operacao = tt-doc-fisc.nat-operacao
        and it-doc-fisc.nr-seq-doc = tt-doc-fisc.nr-seq-doc
        and it-doc-fisc.it-codigo = tt-doc-fisc.it-codigo NO-ERROR.
    IF NOT AVAIL it-doc-fisc THEN NEXT.
    
    /*PUT unformatted tt-doc-fisc.cod-estabel ";" tt-doc-fisc.serie ";" tt-doc-fisc.nr-doc-fis ";" tt-doc-fisc.cod-emitente ";" 
        tt-doc-fisc.nat-operacao ";" tt-doc-fisc.nr-seq-doc ";" tt-doc-fisc.it-codigo skip. */
        
    assign it-doc-fisc.val-pis=tt-doc-fisc.val-pis.    
    assign it-doc-fisc.val-cofins=tt-doc-fisc.val-cofins.    
    ASSIGN substring(it-doc-fisc.char-2,22,4) = '1,65'.
    ASSIGN substring(it-doc-fisc.char-2,30,4) = '7,60'.        


END.
OUTPUT CLOSE.

files.name: altera_situacao_nf_eletronica.p
files.preview: /*EMS206*/ FOR EACH nota-fiscal EXCLUSIVE-LOCK WHERE nota-fiscal.cod-estabel = '101' AND nota-fiscal.serie = '6' AND nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis = '0003029': FIND FIRST sit-nf-eletro EXCLUSIVE-LOCK WHERE sit-nf-eletro.cod-estabel = nota-fiscal.cod-estabel AND sit-nf-eletro.cod-serie = nota-fiscal.serie AND sit-nf-eletro.cod-nota-fis = nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis NO-ERROR. /*OBSERVA€ÇO:****************************************
files.text:
/*EMS206*/
FOR EACH  nota-fiscal EXCLUSIVE-LOCK
    WHERE nota-fiscal.cod-estabel  = '101'
    AND   nota-fiscal.serie        = '6'
    AND   nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis  = '0003029':

    FIND FIRST sit-nf-eletro EXCLUSIVE-LOCK
         WHERE sit-nf-eletro.cod-estabel  = nota-fiscal.cod-estabel
         AND   sit-nf-eletro.cod-serie    = nota-fiscal.serie
         AND   sit-nf-eletro.cod-nota-fis = nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis NO-ERROR.

    /*OBSERVA€ÇO:******************************************************************************/
    /*ap¢s definir dt-cancela = ? o valor da posi‡Æo 3 do campo IECFOAT no FT0904 passa para N*/
    /******************************************************************************************/
  
     ASSIGN nota-fiscal.dt-cancela   = ?
            nota-fiscal.desc-cancela = "".

     IF AVAIL sit-nf-eletro THEN DO:

         /*  2 = Em processamento no EAI          */
         /*  3 = Uso autorizado                   */		 
         /*  7 = Documento Inutilizado            */
         /* 12 = NF-e em Processo de Cancelamento */

          ASSIGN sit-nf-eletro.idi-sit-nf-eletro = 2. 

     END. 

    DISP nota-fiscal.cod-estabel
         nota-fiscal.serie
         nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis
         nota-fiscal.dt-cancela
         INT(sit-nf-eletro.idi-sit-nf-eletro)
         {diinc/i01di135.i 04 sit-nf-eletro.idi-sit-nf-eletro} FORMAT "X(200)"
         WITH 1 COL WIDTH 333.

END.

/*
/*TOTVS 11*/
for each nota-fiscal exclusive-lock
     WHERE nota-fiscal.cod-estabel = "101"
     AND   nota-fiscal.serie       = "2"
     AND   nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis = "0009416".
             
    FOR EACH sit-nf-eletro  
       WHERE sit-nf-eletro.cod-estabel  = nota-fiscal.cod-estabel
         AND sit-nf-eletro.cod-serie    = nota-fiscal.serie  
         AND sit-nf-eletro.cod-nota-fis = nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis EXCLUSIVE-LOCK.
         
        
         
         ASSIGN sit-nf-eletro.idi-sit-nf-eletro = 1 NO-ERROR. /*NFE GERADA*/ */
         
          message "sit-nf-eletro" skip
                 sit-nf-eletro.cod-estabel skip
                 sit-nf-eletro.cod-serie skip
                 sit-nf-eletro.cod-nota-fis skip
                 sit-nf-eletro.idi-sit-nf-eletro skip
                 {diinc/i01di135.i 04 sit-nf-eletro.idi-sit-nf-eletro}
                 view-as alert-box.
         
    end.
     
    /*ASSIGN nota-fiscal.dt-cancela   = ?*/
           nota-fiscal.desc-cancela = ""
           nota-fiscal.idi-sit-nf-eletro = 1.
           
    message "Nota Fiscal" skip
             nota-fiscal.cod-estabel skip
             nota-fiscal.serie skip
             nota-fiscal.nr-nota-fis skip
             nota-fiscal.dt-cancela skip
             nota-fiscal.idi-forma-emis-nf-eletro skip
             {diinc/i01di135.i 04 nota-fiscal.idi-forma-emis-nf-eletro} skip
             nota-fiscal.idi-sit-nf-eletro skip
             {diinc/i01di135.i 04 nota-fiscal.idi-sit-nf-eletro}
             view-as alert-box.
     
end.
*/

   /* DISPLAY  habilit_ferias    WITH 1 COLUMN WIDTH 320.*/
    UPDATE habilit_ferias.dat_inic_period_aqst_ferias.
   /*  UPDATE habilit_ferias.dat_term_period_aqst_ferias.*/
   
   FOR EACH period_aqst_ferias EXCLUSIVE-LOCK
    WHERE  period_aqst_ferias.cdn_estab=201
    AND period_aqst_ferias.cdn_funcionario=46
    AND period_aqst_ferias.dat_inic_period_aqst_ferias=07/01/2010:
    /*UPDATE  period_aqst_ferias.*/
    DISPLAY period_aqst_ferias    WITH 1 COLUMN WIDTH 320.
	
	UPDATE period_aqst_ferias 
    SET dat_concess_efetd[1]=01/30/2012
    WHERE  period_aqst_ferias.cdn_estab=201
    AND period_aqst_ferias.cdn_funcionario=46
    AND period_aqst_ferias.dat_inic_period_aqst_ferias=07/01/2010:
    /*UPDATE  period_aqst_ferias.*/
   /* DISPLAY period_aqst_ferias    WITH 1 COLUMN WIDTH 320.*/
   
   UPDATE period_aqst_ferias 
    SET idi_sit_period_aqst_ferias=0
    WHERE  period_aqst_ferias.cdn_estab=201
    AND period_aqst_ferias.cdn_funcionario=46
    AND period_aqst_ferias.dat_inic_period_aqst_ferias=07/01/2011:
    /*UPDATE  period_aqst_ferias.*/
   /* DISPLAY period_aqst_ferias    WITH 1 COLUMN WIDTH 320.*/
    
	UPDATE period_aqst_ferias 
    SET  qtd_dias_direito_period_aqst=0 ,
         qtd_dias_ferias_concedid=0,
         dat_concess_efetd[1]=NULL,
         dat_concess_efetd[2]=NULL,
         qtd_dias_gozado[1]=0,
         qtd_dias_gozado[2]=0
        
    WHERE  period_aqst_ferias.cdn_estab=201
    AND period_aqst_ferias.cdn_funcionario=46
    AND period_aqst_ferias.dat_inic_period_aqst_ferias=07/01/2011:
    /*UPDATE  period_aqst_ferias.*/
   /* DISPLAY period_aqst_ferias    WITH 1 COLUMN WIDTH 320.*/
